use_cases: FAQ sections on personal portfolio or creative agency websites
Collapsible content sections for design system documentation
Expandable feature explanations in product landing pages
Q&A sections for educational or tutorial platforms
Team or service descriptions with hidden detail views
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist accordion component with smooth expand/collapse animations featuring rotating icons and rounded corner transitions. The design uses bold typography with a subtle primary-tinted background on triggers, creating an elegant FAQ or content reveal interface suitable for design-forward websites, portfolios, and SaaS documentation pages.
